businessChallenge.zh: 個人記帳需自動連動銀行帳戶與帳務，減少重複輸入，同時提供直覺的雙平台使用體驗。
businessChallenge.en: Personal finance needed automatic account and ledger linking with an intuitive dual-platform experience, minimizing manual data entry.

technicalStrategy.zh: 採用原生開發（Kotlin + SwiftUI）確保各平台最佳體驗，Realm 作為本地資料層。獨立完成產品設計、架構、開發與上架全流程。
technicalStrategy.en: Native development (Kotlin + SwiftUI) for optimal platform experience, Realm as local data layer. Solo ownership of product design, architecture, development, and launch.

text.zh: 獨立完成從產品概念到上架的完整交付
text.en: Solo end-to-end delivery from product concept to store launch

lessonsLearned.zh: Side project 是驗證產品思維與全端能力的最佳場域。原生開發雖成本高，但對 FinTech 類產品的體驗與效能至關重要。
lessonsLearned.en: Side projects are the best arena to validate product thinking and full-stack capability. Native development costs more, but is critical for FinTech UX and performance.

problem.zh: 個人記帳需自動連動帳戶與帳務，減少重複輸入。
problem.en: Personal finance needed automatic account and ledger linking.

solution.zh: 雙平台 App + Next.js 官網；獨立完成產品、架構、開發與上架。
solution.en: Dual-platform app + Next.js site; solo product, architecture, development, and launch.
